docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $520.00 FILED BY ABREGO FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CALDEDRON ANA A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
